ingredients.item:
2 heads of radicchio Trevisano
5 blood oranges
2 tsp sumac
generous handful of dill, leaves picked and finely chopped
ingredients.original:
2 heads of radicchio Trevisano
5 blood oranges
2 tsp sumac
generous handful of dill, leaves picked and finely chopped

ingredients.item:
4 tbsp olive oil
2 tbsp pomegranate molasses
1 tbsp red wine vinegar
sea salt
freshly ground black pepper
